name: success_story
description: TikTok template celebrating adoption success stories
caption:
{{dog_name}} FOUND A HOME!

After {{pluralize days_in_shelter "day" "days"}} waiting, {{dog_name}} finally met {{dog_pronoun_possessive}} perfect match.

{{#if adopter_name}}{{adopter_name}} walked in and knew immediately - {{dog_name}} was the one.{{else}}Someone special walked in and their hearts connected instantly.{{/if}}

{{wait_time_formatted}} of waiting
{{pluralize days_in_shelter "day" "days"}} in the shelter
Countless people who walked past

But all it took was ONE person to see what we always knew - {{dog_name}} is perfect.

{{#if dog_description}}{{truncate dog_description 150}}{{/if}}

Every share brings more dogs home. Every adoption proves that shelter dogs are amazing.

Thank you to everyone who shared, commented, and believed in {{dog_name}}.

This is why we do what we do.

Who's next? There are more {{dog_name}}'s waiting.

{{hashtags_formatted}}

variables.days_in_shelter: Required - Days dog spent in shelter
